During the [[Tionese War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Honorable Union of Desevro and Tion|Honorable Union of Desevro & Tion]], the Union's forces '''bombarded''' the Republic [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] with waves of [[pressure bomb]]s.

{{Battle-stub}}
